name: Stuffed Baby Zucchini "Silver Palate
recipeIngredient: 2 Italian plum tomatoes, seeded and cut into 1/8 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each zucchini lengthwise in half, leaving any blossoms on one of the halves.
2. With the tip of a vegetable peeler, carefully scoop out the pulp, making a little shell. Reserve the pulp.
3. Heat the oil in a small skillet over low heat.
4. Add the garlic and shallot and sauté for one minute.
5. Add the zucchini pulp, tomatoes, 1 tablespoon of parsley, thyme, and black pepper to taste. Cook, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes.
6. Cool mixture to room temperature.
7. Spoon the filling into the zucchini shells.
8. Sprinkle with remaining parsley.
9. Arrange on a flat basket or platter and serve at room temperature.
